title: The Weekly Challenge - 327
task1_desc: You are given an array of `n` integers.
task1_body:
You are given an array of `n` integers. Write a script to find all the missing integers in the range `1..n` in the given array.
#### Example 1 Input: @ints = (1, 2, 1, 3, 2, 5) Output: (4, 6) The given array has 6 elements. So we are looking for integers in the range 1..6 in the given array. The missing integers: (4, 6)
#### Example 2 Input: @ints = (1, 1, 1) Output: (2, 3)
#### Example 3 Input: @ints = (2, 2, 1) Output: (3)
task2_desc: You are given an array of distinct integers.
task2_body:
You are given an array of distinct integers. Write a script to find all pairs of elements with minimum absolute difference (MAD) of any two elements.
#### Example 1 Input: @ints = (4, 1, 2, 3) Output: [1,2], [2,3], [3,4] The minimum absolute difference is 1. Pairs with MAD: [1,2], [2,3], [3,4]
#### Example 2 Input: @ints = (1, 3, 7, 11, 15) Output: [1,3]
#### Example 3 Input: @ints = (1, 5, 3, 8) Output: [1,3], [3,5]
Last date to submit the solution `23:59 (UK Time) Sunday 29th June 2025`.
